name: Competitive Edge

heightened.text: Increase the base bonus to +2 and the increased bonus after an enemy critically succeeds to +4.

text: Your competitiveness drives you to prove yourself against the opposition. You gain a +1 status bonus to attack rolls and skill checks. If an enemy within 20 feet critically succeeds at an attack roll or skill check, your status bonus increases to +3 for attack rolls or that specific skill check (whichever the foe critically succeeded at) for 1 round.
